tool.name: Record Gauge Relativity
tool.description: Index claims to gauge and scope (Phase 7). Document how claims transform between different representational frames.

claim_id.description: ID of the claim being indexed

scope.description: Domain scope where claim is valid

gauge_shifts.description: How claim transforms to other gauges

invariants.description: Aspects of the claim that are gauge-invariant

ai.systemPromptSection:
### record_gauge_relativity
Index claims to gauge and scope. This is Phase 7 of the Collapse Engine workflow.

usageExamples.description: Record gauge relativity for a claim
usageExamples.input: {"session_id": "sess-123", "claim_id": "claim-1", "gauge_anchor_id": "gauge-ml", "scope": "overparameterized networks", "gauge_shifts": [{"target_gauge": "physics", "transformed_claim": "Learning dynamics follow Langevin equation at temperature T=learning_rate", "transformation_notes": "Replace loss with energy, learning rate with temperature"}], "invariants": ["Convergence to stationary distribution"]}

whenToUse: Documenting how claims depend on representation
